findings.b2nerd_pos_semantics: exclusive [start, end) — 324,558/324,566 matches exhaustive (8 edge cases in TweetNER7)
findings.b2nerd_zh_pos: absent in ALL versions (curated, raw, B2NERD_all) — 0/29 curated, 0/37 raw, 0/32 all
findings.b2nerd_en_pos: present in 25/26 curated, 26/27 raw EN datasets (absent: PileNER only)

chinese_ner_sft_offsets.note: msra: multi-char entities exclusive, single-char inclusive (40/10 in first 50)

quality_audit.method: Haiku 4.5 evaluation of 30 random EN samples
quality_audit.note: Codex-generated records are the likely low-scorers. Plan: dilute with 20K+ sonnet/gemini records from remaining B2NERD pool in Task 8 (scale-up), not re-gen existing.

task_7.description: Temporal granularity classifier + View B data sweep

task_7b.notes: MultiNERD and polyglot_ner excluded after license verification. tner/multinerd is a mirror of Babelscape/multinerd (CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0). Net addition: +360K records (mostly French).

task_7c.description: Expand View B type mapping — full Oneiron ontology + Gemini sweep + heuristics
task_7c.rationale: 59% of entities (5.9M) get NO View B copy. Only 68 static mappings for 246K unique types. View B only maps to 5 types but Oneiron has 12+ canonical types.

skip: SKILL_REF — requires runtime context (installed agentskills.io skills)

notes.RELATIONSHIP_REF: References to RELATIONSHIP structural entities (rl prefix). E.g. 'my sister', 'our friendship'
notes.SKILL_REF: References to installed SKILL entities (sk prefix, agentskills.io). Cannot be trained without runtime context
notes.TEMPORAL_REF: Vague/relative time refs. May merge with DATE -> Vague via temporal classifier

phase_1_gemini_sweep.description: Feed 22K unmapped types (>=10 occurrences, all datasets) to Gemini 1M context. Classify each into Oneiron canonical types (PERSON, PLACE, ORG, DATE, EMOTION, GOAL, ACTIVITY, RELATIONSHIP_REF, EVENT, RITUAL, TEMPORAL_REF).
phase_1_gemini_sweep.method: Single Gemini pass over all type names + counts
phase_1_gemini_sweep.note: B2NERD types are LLM-generated free-form text — keyword matching misses many (e.g. goals labeled as 'objective', 'aspiration', 'ambition')

phase_2_heuristics.description: Build scripts/lib/type_utils.py with keyword heuristics + hierarchy parsing (split on ' -> ' and ' / ') as fallback for non-B2NERD datasets

phase_3_resweep.description: Re-run convert_all.py with expanded type mappings to regenerate View B with all Oneiron types
phase_3_resweep.note: Combine with task-7 temporal sweep — single re-run

EVENT.note: LIFE_EVENT is a plugin extension of EVENT, not a separate NER type

b2nerd_scan_results.note: Counts from keyword scan only — Gemini sweep expected to find significantly more

task_8.description: Roleplay dataset NER labeling (JA-Roleplay 4.3K + ChatHaruhi 11.5K) via codex-spark

task_9.description: Scale up B2NERD conversationalization + entity augmentation

phase_1_augment_existing.description: Augment existing 7K conversation records with Oneiron entity types
steps: Apply 7c type mappings to existing entities → View B copies (programmatic)
Gemini pass over 7K records to find NEW entities B2NERD missed (GOAL, RITUAL, LIFE_EVENT, RELATIONSHIP_REF, ACTIVITY, TEMPORAL_REF)
Merge Gemini-found entities into existing records
phase_1_augment_existing.note: Don't re-generate conversations — just augment entity annotations

phase_2_generate_new.description: Generate ~34K new conversation records with full Oneiron ontology baked into prompt
phase_2_generate_new.note: Updated conversationalization prompt includes GOAL, RITUAL, LIFE_EVENT, RELATIONSHIP_REF, ACTIVITY labels — no second NER pass needed

phase_3_integrate.description: Add all conversation data (7K augmented + 34K new) to pipeline
steps: Generate View B copies using expanded type mappings
Include in dedup → split → chat format pipeline
